implementedBehavior: Added an explicit model:check npm script for operator-triggered official model catalog checks.
The command reads OPENAI_API_KEY, optional OPENAI_BASE_URL, CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_MODE, and CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_EVIDENCE_PATH.
Strict mode treats unavailable catalog access or model policy drift as blocking.
Warn mode records the same evidence but does not block when catalog access is unavailable.
Evidence records sanitized base URL metadata and apiKeyConfigured, but not raw API keys, Authorization headers, or raw request headers.

offlineCommandSmoke.command: OPENAI_API_KEY empty; CODEX_CLI_MODEL_CHECK_MODE=warn; npm run model:check

limitations: No live OpenAI /models request was executed in this implementation validation.
A live strict catalog acceptance run still requires OPENAI_API_KEY and explicit operator intent.
This command is the manual operator check; host startup wiring can reuse the same library functions in a later integration step.
